display_text: Arcane Blink, Cost: 6800: Provides a 1400-range targeted teleport. After blinking, heals the user for 250 HP and restores 100 Mana. Cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking hero or Roshan damage. Upgraded Blink Dagger variant offering sustain after repositioning. Stats: CD: 9s, Range: 1400, Heal: 250, Mana Restore: 100, Damage Cooldown: 3s.

display_text: Arcane Blink, Cost: 6800: Provides +25 Intelligence and the core Blink active. No other stat bonuses. The Intelligence boost increases the mana pool, benefiting spellcasters who need to follow up blinks with mana-intensive combos. Stats: Intelligence: +25.
search_text: arcane blink stats, intelligence stats, intelligence item, blink stats, mana pool item, int blink, Arcane Blink

display_text: Arcane Blink, Cost: 6800: A high-impact initiation and repositioning tool that also heals and restores mana, allowing casters to commit to a fight after blinking. The sustain helps mitigate poke damage that would disable the item. Its long range enables deep dives and decisive team fight starts.
search_text: arcane blink initiation, team fight blink, sustain after blink, caster initiation, hero blink, reposition sustain, aggressive blink, sustain repositioning, team fight role, fight sustain, Arcane Blink

display_text: Arcane Blink, Cost: 6800: Ideal for high-mana, high-impact spellcasters and initiators who need to land combos after a long-range blink (e.g., Magnus, Enigma, Tidehunter). The mana restore ensures ability follow-through, and the Intelligence scales with spell damage. A luxury upgrade for Blink Dagger users.
search_text: arcane blink synergy, blink magnus, blink enigma, blink tidehunter, intelligence initiator, luxury blink, late game blink, spellcaster blink, combo blink, mana initiator, Arcane Blink

display_text: Arcane Blink, Cost: 6800: Primarily a situational luxury upgrade for Blink Dagger carriers who also benefit from Intelligence. Consider against lineups that apply frequent hero damage, as the 3-second damage lockout is a key weakness. The item's high cost delays other core items.
